title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. horripilum
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. horripilum, a lesser-known species of the hawkweed plant, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. horripilum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Hieracium glaucinum subsp. horripilum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
